reasoning: The control SC-23(2) focuses on session authenticity with user-initiated logouts and message displays, which is a withdrawn control and primarily pertains to application-level session management. Kubernetes, as a container orchestration platform, does not directly manage user sessions or application-level authentication mechanisms. This control is more relevant to application-level security rather than infrastructure-level security like Kubernetes.
title: Session Authenticity - Session authenticity | user - initiated logouts and message displays [withdrawn
